---
title: "Marketing Projects"
description: "Marketing projects, case studies, and applied business work."
---

## Marketing Projects

This section will hold Arturo's applied marketing projects, including class assignments, independent work, campaign ideas, customer research, and business case studies.

The goal is to show how Arturo thinks through marketing problems: identifying the audience, understanding the customer need, defining a message, recommending channels, and connecting the work to measurable outcomes.

## Project Slots

::: {.content-grid}
::: {.content-card}
### Customer Profile or Persona

Add a project that defines a target customer, their goals, pain points, buying motivations, and decision process.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Campaign Concept

Add a campaign idea with objective, audience, message, channels, and success metrics.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Product or Service Positioning

Add a positioning analysis that explains how a product or service should be presented to a specific audience.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Competitive Analysis

Add research comparing brands, products, competitors, pricing, customer experience, or communication strategy.
:::

::: {.content-card}
### Retail Sales & Marketing Reflection

Add a reflection connecting Best Buy experience to marketing concepts such as customer journey, value proposition, product education, and relationship building.
:::
:::
